description: Statistical-arbitrage pairs desk - the market-neutral sleeve. Finds cointegrated within-sector pairs dislocated past 2 sigma (AR(1) half-life gate + structural-break guards), outputs long/short trade tickets. Output data/pairs-arb.json.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Daily 23:30 UTC via Amazon EventBridge Scheduler (after the US close, once EOD prices settle). Scheduler is the go-forward path - the classic EventBridge 300-rule pool is saturated. Provisioned by ops 824.
